overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge at night. The camera faces forward over the ship's bow with navigation displays visible overhead, while the vessel moves steadily through coastal waters during a lightning storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with electronic displays

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface on the starboard side

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, monitoring navigation displays while sailing through coastal waters at night

segments.scene_description: From the elevated bridge of a ship, the view looks forward over the bow into dark coastal waters at night. Three electronic displays show navigation data overhead while the vessel cruises steadily. A sudden lightning flash briefly lights up the ocean on the right side, momentarily brightening the scene before returning to darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with electronic displays

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady course through the coastal waters, monitoring the radar sweep

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its steady forward movement through the dark waters. The bridge remains illuminated by the three navigation displays while the radar rotates continuously. The ocean appears calm and the horizon remains visible as the ship maintains its course without further weather events.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a ship's bridge through dark coastal waters, transitioning from a moment of atmospheric tension to a steady, calm cruise. It begins with a view over the bow under the glow of three overhead navigation displays, where a sudden flash of lightning momentarily illuminates the ocean to the right. As the brilliance of the storm fades back into darkness, the vessel maintains its steady course across the quiet sea. The scene then settles into a rhythmic progression, with the rotating radar and illuminated bridge consoles providing the only light against a stable, dark horizon.
